query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `activities` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int,
	`contactId` int,
	`leadId` int,
	`type` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`description` text NOT NULL,
	`metadata` json,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `activities_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int,
	`contactId` int,
	`leadId` int,
	`type` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`description` text NOT NULL,
	`metadata` json,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `activities_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
